scenario_description: The user first asks to put Revenue total on Sheet2, then changes their mind and wants it at the bottom of Sheet1 instead, and to delete Sheet2.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me put the Revenue total on Sheet2
Wrong location. Put the total at the bottom of the Revenue column on Sheet1 instead, and delete Sheet2, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; xl = pd.ExcelFile('/home/user/Desktop/NetIncome.xlsx'); print('PASSED' if 'Sheet2' not in xl.sheet_names else 'FAILED')"
